message:
fix: 6 correctness bugs — COUNT(col) strings, sorted merge offset, percentile interpolation, three-valued AND/OR

- partial-agg: COUNT(col) on non-numeric columns (strings, booleans) now counts non-null values
  instead of returning 0 (4 code paths: row ungrouped, row grouped, columnar ungrouped, columnar grouped)
- merge: sorted k-way merge path now applies query.offset (was only applied in unsorted path)
- partial-agg: values.push(...source) → loop push to prevent stack overflow on large median/percentile merges
- sql/executor: GROUP BY null/"" collision fixed with sentinel (same fix as partial-agg from round 5)
- sql/executor: percentile algorithm aligned with partial-agg (linear interpolation instead of nearest-rank)
- sql/evaluator: AND/OR now implements SQL three-valued logic (NULL AND TRUE = NULL, NULL OR FALSE = NULL)
